summary: Frontend-only testing of Accessibility Games. Validated lobby, all 21 game routes (each renders game-title, game-area, back-to-lobby, open-help-btn), settings panel (themes, language, RTL, text scale, toggles), localStorage persistence across reload, skip-link focus, and core gameplay flows (Memory, Wheel, Jeopardy, Pattern, Sequence, Solitaire, Tap-to-Calm, Breathing, Grounding). No runtime/console/page errors observed.
action_items: Minor: data-testid naming inconsistency vs review request. Review expects theme-light/hc/calm/dark, lang-select, reduced-motion-toggle. Actual implementation uses theme-light-btn/hc-btn/calm-btn/dark-btn, language-select, reduce-motion-toggle. Either rename or update review expectations. Functionality works correctly.
Minor: Jeopardy answer buttons use data-testid 'jeopardy-answer-{0..3}' (review wording said 'choices'). Works correctly.

Minor: Memory game lacks a 'matched-count' or pair-progress testid (request mentions pair count selector restarts deck — that DOES exist as 'memory-pairs-select'). Consider adding an explicit matched/total testid for tests.

Minor: Pattern tile aria-labels show just color name ('Red','Blue','Green','Yellow'). Visual icon/shape differentiation is present in the tile (data-shape variants), but consider also including the shape word in aria-label so screen-reader users get an explicit non-color cue (e.g., 'Red circle').
Minor: No 'reset-settings-btn' testid in Accessibility panel — request implied resetting via toggles, but a reset-all button would aid testing/UX.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings persistence works correctly via localStorage key 'ag.v1.settings' (utils/storage.js namespace). Confirmed reload preserves theme=dark, lang=es, motion=reduced, text scale=1.5.
RTL handling correct: switching to Arabic sets <html dir='rtl'>.
Language detection runs at first mount only when no stored settings exist — fine for the 'auto-detect' requirement.
All 21 game routes render without runtime errors. No console errors captured across full route walk.
GameLayout consistently provides back-to-lobby and open-help-btn — good architectural reuse.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is at https://dc360e19-e07f-4ba9-ba5d-d18e0f8f5730.preview.emergentagent.com. All 21 game routes work; settings persist under localStorage key 'ag.v1.settings'. Actual testids slightly differ from review request: theme-{light|hc|calm|dark}-btn (not theme-{...}), language-select (not lang-select), reduce-motion-toggle (not reduced-motion-toggle), jeopardy-answer-{0..3} (not jeopardy-choice-*). Useful gameplay testids: tc-taps + tc-shape-{a..f}, sol-card-{1..8} + sol-moves, wheel-spin + wheel-spin-btn + wheel-letter-{A..Z} + wheel-puzzle, pattern-start-btn + pattern-tile-{red|blue|green|yellow} + pattern-caption, sequence-item-{i} + sequence-up-{i} + sequence-down-{i}, br-pattern-select + br-start-btn + br-phase, gr-step + gr-next-btn, or-input-{name|day|month|year|place|meal} + or-finish-btn, jeopardy-cell-{r}-{c} + jeopardy-answer-{0..3} + jeopardy-clue, memory-card-{0..N} + memory-pairs-select, gf-ask-{rank} + gf-turn + gf-log.
rca of the issue: No defects of any priority found. All testable behaviour passes.
